atomicity.message: Staged changes promote one COS throughput doctrine into orchestrator templates, generated skill references, prompt-bank entries, and matching tests.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh verified the staged Go/template payload is syntactically clean and focused prompt-bank/scaffold tests pass.
evidence: Agent Mail 3512: staged hash matched sha256:8bb402383e9676f960cb6aaa400fc9410fed9b8ccdd87d02179fcd1e5c2684aa with exactly the nine packeted prompt/scaffold paths.
Agent Mail 3512: git diff --cached --check exited 0.

Agent Mail 3512: go test ./internal/backpressure -run 'PromptBank|PromptExport' -count=1 and go test ./internal/scaffold -run 'Template|Orchestrator|Claude|Skill|Prompt|Throughput|GateOperator' -count=1 passed.

conditions.message: BrightOwl found one throughput doctrine added across established prompt/template surfaces with mirrored scaffold copies and no competing queue model.
evidence: Agent Mail 3515: reconstructed the patch-backed slice in an isolated temp clone and reproduced hash sha256:8bb402383e9676f960cb6aaa400fc9410fed9b8ccdd87d02179fcd1e5c2684aa.
Agent Mail 3515: mirror checks passed for ORCHESTRATOR.md.tmpl and both generated skill reference template pairs.
Agent Mail 3515: git diff --cached --stat showed one compact slice: nine files, 201 insertions, 18 deletions.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the doctrine moves verification earlier without creating a shortcut around verification.
evidence: Agent Mail 3515: new doctrine preserves hash-bound verifier packets, superseding packets on hash changes, real verifier evidence, and explicit operator escalation.
Agent Mail 3515: gate-operator-brief renders instructions to run gate mechanics only, avoid implementation claims, stage only named payload or attestation, and escalate instead of judging.
Agent Mail 3515: commit-choreography renders the verify-early variant: hash at park time, mail packets, keep the window free, reconfirm hash, and supersede stale evidence.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the prompt-bank and scaffold doctrine additions are covered by focused tests.
evidence: Agent Mail 3515: prompt_bank_test.go adds gate-operator-brief to requiredPromptNames and asserts rendered prompt content.
Agent Mail 3515: template_contract_test.go adds TestOrchestratorTemplateCarriesThroughputDoctrine and TestClaudeOrchestratorSkillReferencesThroughputDoctrine.
Agent Mail 3515: focused internal/backpressure and internal/scaffold tests passed in the isolated temp clone.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the packet hash, focused tests, prompt rendering, and template mirrors; EmeraldBrook restaged the same slice and confirmed the live hash before gate.
evidence: Agent Mail 3515: patch-backed verification reproduced hash sha256:8bb402383e9676f960cb6aaa400fc9410fed9b8ccdd87d02179fcd1e5c2684aa and git diff --cached --check passed.
Agent Mail 3515: focused tests and prompt rendering checks passed.

EmeraldBrook restaged the same nine files after WhiteGorge released the stale gate reservation; go run ./cmd/burpvalve hash --staged --json returned the same sha256:8bb402383e9676f960cb6aaa400fc9410fed9b8ccdd87d02179fcd1e5c2684aa.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh verified the packet lists the staged paths, condition packets, and no hidden generated exclusions.
evidence: Agent Mail 3512: /tmp/cos-throughput-verifier-prompts.json contained hash sha256:8bb402..., 13 packets, and expected condition ids.
Agent Mail 3512: git diff --cached --name-status listed exactly the prompt-bank, ORCHESTRATOR template, generated skill reference, and template test paths.
Agent Mail 3512: hash_excluded_staged_payload was empty.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the slice stays within COS throughput doctrine and does not touch unrelated surfaces.
evidence: Agent Mail 3515: staged path list was limited to prompt bank, prompt tests, scaffold contract tests, ORCHESTRATOR template, and two generated skill reference template pairs.
Agent Mail 3515: SKILL.md.tmpl was not staged; bulk doctrine remains in references.
Agent Mail 3515: no production gate execution, tracker state, release docs, or unrelated skill package surfaces were staged.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh found no destructive command addition; the only bypass-looking token is an explicit prohibition.
evidence: Agent Mail 3512: git diff --cached --stat showed nine prompt-bank/scaffold-template files only.
Agent Mail 3512: scan for TODO/FIXME/password/secret/token/rm -rf/--no-verify/chmod +x/0o755 found only the safety sentence Never use --no-verify.
Agent Mail 3512: no staged path is a script, hook, release installer, or executable permission surface.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh verified root and embedded template copies match and prompt-bank command output exposes the new prompt and verify-early content.
evidence: Agent Mail 3512: cmp checks passed for ORCHESTRATOR.md.tmpl and both generated skill reference template pairs.
Agent Mail 3512: prompts list showed commit-choreography and gate-operator-brief.
Agent Mail 3512: prompts show checks found verify-early and gate-operator guardrail text.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified the payload adds operating guidance and prompt text without expanding secret, auth, network, permission, or destructive-command capability.
evidence: Agent Mail 3515: staged files are Go prompt/test files and Markdown template files; no installer, hook, auth, network, or command runner implementation files are staged.
Agent Mail 3515: staged doctrine contains explicit stop/escalation and no-fabrication language.
Agent Mail 3515: gate-operator-brief renders instructions to run only exact commands and stop on scope, reservation, hash, test, verifier-evidence, or unexpected-staging problems.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh verified the staged payload has no governed visual UI, image, SVG, CSS, layout, or terminal rendering surface.
evidence: Agent Mail 3512: git diff --cached --name-status listed only .go and .md.tmpl paths under internal/backpressure, internal/scaffold/templates, and templates.
Agent Mail 3512: no staged file is an image, CSS file, TUI renderer, VHS tape, or generated visual artifact.

conditions.message: ScarletMarsh verified the payload adds static prompt/template text and tests with no runtime performance-sensitive surface.
evidence: Agent Mail 3512: git diff --cached --stat showed only prompt-bank, scaffold-template, and test edits, with no new dependency files or runtime execution path outside prompt/template lookup.
Agent Mail 3512: focused internal/backpressure and internal/scaffold tests passed.

conditions.message: BrightOwl verified queue self-promotion and gate-operator authority are constrained by release wakes, recorded queue, silence, step-zero checks, and escalation.
evidence: Agent Mail 3515: ORCHESTRATOR and gate-window reference text tie self-promotion to a release wake, recorded queue, silent pane ahead, and step-zero index check.
Agent Mail 3515: gate-operator-brief says do not claim implementation work and escalate rather than judge.
Agent Mail 3515: prompt output includes explicit stops for hash/test/verifier/scope/reservation/unexpected-staging problems.
